Early stages emphasize foundational capabilities (reasoning and general domains) to consolidate the model’s base competence, while later stages progressively increase the proportion of agent and coding tasks to sharpen task-specific performance.
items.zh: 领域混合比例。每个阶段调整来自每个领域的数据的相对比例。早期阶段强调基础能力（推理和通用领域）以巩固模型的基本能力，而后期阶段逐渐增加智能体和编码任务的比例以提升任务特定性能。

items.en: Context length. We expand the maximum context length at a per-domain granularity across stages. This curriculum-style progression enables the model to first master short-horizon decision-making before extending to the long-context trajectories characteristic of complex agent tasks.
items.zh: 上下文长度。我们跨阶段以每个领域的粒度扩展最大上下文长度。这种课程式进展使模型能够首先掌握短时域决策，然后扩展到复杂智能体任务特有的长上下文轨迹。

items.en: Difficulty distribution. Within each domain, the difficulty distribution of training tasks shifts progressively toward harder instances. Early stages include a broad mix to establish robust foundations, while later stages concentrate on challenging scenarios that push the policy’s frontier.
items.zh: 难度分布。在每个领域内，训练任务的难度分布逐渐向更难实例转移。早期阶段包含广泛的混合以建立稳健基础，而后期阶段则集中于挑战性场景以推动策略的前沿。

items.en: This mixed-domain strategy yields compounding benefits: it simultaneously improves the model’s foundational reasoning ability, task-specific quality across all target domains, and end-to-end user experience—since agents deployed in practice encounter a heterogeneous mix of requests that spans all four domains.
items.zh: 这种混合领域策略产生了复合效益：它同时提高了模型的基础推理能力、所有目标领域的任务特定质量以及端到端用户体验——因为实际部署的智能体会遇到跨越所有四个领域的异构请求混合。

items.en: Training RL agents at scale requires simultaneously satisfying three desiderata that are fundamentally in tension—the “impossible triangle”:
items.zh: 大规模训练强化学习智能体需要同时满足三个本质上相互冲突的要求——“不可能三角”：

items.en: System Throughput: maximizing the raw tokens processed per unit time, governed by rollout latency, training iteration time, data processing overhead, and I/O bandwidth.
items.zh: 系统吞吐量：最大化单位时间内处理的原始 token 数量，由 rollout 延迟、训练迭代时间、数据处理开销和 I/O 带宽决定。

items.en: Training Stability: bounding the variance of policy gradient updates to ensure monotonic improvement and convergence, i.e., 𝔼​[Var​(∇θJ)]<δ\mathbb{E}[\mathrm{Var}(\nabla_{\theta}J)]<\delta.
items.zh: 训练稳定性：限制策略梯度更新的方差以确保单调改进和收敛，即 E[Var(∇θJ)] < δ。

items.en: Agent Flexibility: supporting arbitrary agent architectures 𝒜∈Ωagent\mathcal{A}\in\Omega_{\text{agent}}—from simple single-turn scaffolds to complex multi-agent systems with dynamic context management—without requiring agent-specific modifications to the training framework.
items.zh: 智能体灵活性：支持任意智能体架构 A∈Ωagent——从简单的单轮脚手架到具有动态上下文管理的复杂多智能体系统——无需对训练框架进行智能体特定的修改。

items.en: We formulate the infrastructure optimization objective as maximizing the Effective Agent Training Yield:
items.zh: 我们将基础设施优化目标表述为最大化有效智能体训练产出：

items.en: Each pair of these three goals creates a specific engineering tension. Maximizing throughput under heterogeneous agent rollout times (ranging from seconds to hours) conflicts with maintaining distributional consistency for stable training. Supporting arbitrary agent architectures conflicts with the tight coupling between agent state and training logic required for efficient data processing. Achieving stable credit assignment in long-horizon trajectories (up to 192K tokens) conflicts with throughput-optimal scheduling that biases toward short, easy tasks. The Forge infrastructure resolves these tensions through the architectural and algorithmic designs described below.
items.zh: 这三对目标中的每一对都会产生特定的工程张力。在异构智能体推出时间（从几秒到几小时）下最大化吞吐量，与为稳定训练保持分布一致性相冲突。支持任意智能体架构与高效数据处理所需的智能体状态与训练逻辑之间的紧密耦合相冲突。在长程轨迹（高达192K token）中实现稳定的信用分配，与偏向短、简单任务的吞吐量最优调度相冲突。Forge基础设施通过下文描述的架构和算法设计解决了这些张力。

items.en: The Forge system is organized into three decoupled modules connected through a middleware abstraction layer (Figure 4). This architecture directly operationalizes the agent RL modeling described in the preceding subsection: the boundary between policy and environment—drawn at the model’s generation interface—maps onto the boundary between the Training/Inference Side and the Agent Side.
items.zh: Forge系统由三个解耦模块组成，通过中间件抽象层连接（图4）。该架构直接实现了前一子节中描述的智能体强化学习建模：策略与环境之间的边界——在模型的生成接口处划定——映射到训练/推理侧与智能体侧之间的边界。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Overview of the Forge RL system. Three decoupled modules—Agent Side, Training/Inference Side, and the middleware abstraction layer (Gateway Server, Data Pool)—communicate through standardized interfaces, allowing the agent and the training loop to scale independently.
items.capZh: 图4：Forge强化学习系统概览。三个解耦模块——智能体侧、训练/推理侧和中间件抽象层（网关服务器、数据池）——通过标准化接口通信，允许智能体和训练循环独立扩展。

items.en: Agent Side. This module encapsulates arbitrary agent implementations and orchestrates their interactions with external environments. Functioning as a pure trajectory producer, the agent side is entirely agnostic to training and inference mechanics. It drives the environment dynamics defined in the MDP formulation—executing tool calls, managing context, and accessing memory—and records the resulting (st,at,ot)(s_{t},a_{t},o_{t}) tuples for downstream training consumption.
items.zh: 智能体侧。该模块封装了任意智能体实现，并协调其与外部环境的交互。作为纯粹的轨迹生成器，智能体侧完全独立于训练和推理机制。它驱动MDP公式中定义的环境动态——执行工具调用、管理上下文和访问记忆——并记录生成的 (st, at, ot) 元组，供下游训练使用。

items.en: Middleware Abstraction Layer. Two components bridge the agent and training sides. The Gateway Server provides a standardized communication interface that routes completion requests between agents and the LLM engine, abstracting away the heterogeneity of agent scaffolds. The Data Pool serves as distributed trajectory storage that asynchronously collects rollout data, fully decoupling the generation and training pipelines and enabling each to scale independently.
items.zh: 中间件抽象层。两个组件桥接智能体侧和训练侧。网关服务器提供标准化通信接口，在智能体和LLM引擎之间路由补全请求，抽象掉智能体脚手架的异构性。数据池作为分布式轨迹存储，异步收集推出数据，完全解耦生成和训练流水线，使两者能够独立扩展。

items.en: Training and Inference Side. The Rollout Engine handles high-throughput token generation, serving as the policy πθ\pi_{\theta} that responds to Gateway requests. The Train Engine consumes processed trajectory sequences from the Data Pool, computes the CISPO policy gradient, and synchronizes updated weights back to the Rollout Engine.
items.zh: 训练和推理侧。推出引擎处理高吞吐量token生成，作为响应网关请求的策略 πθ。训练引擎从数据池消费处理后的轨迹序列，计算CISPO策略梯度，并将更新后的权重同步回推出引擎。

items.en: The MDP formulation in the preceding subsection defines context management, tool execution, and memory access as environment dynamics. The infrastructure must support two distinct paradigms for how agents implement these dynamics, which differ in the degree of visibility the framework has into the agent’s internal state.
items.zh: 前一子节中的MDP公式将上下文管理、工具执行和记忆访问定义为环境动态。基础设施必须支持智能体实现这些动态的两种不同范式，它们在框架对智能体内部状态的可见性程度上有所不同。

items.en: White-Box Agents expose their context management logic to the training framework. The state transition st+1=fCM​(concat​(st,at,ot))s_{t+1}=f_{\text{CM}}(\mathrm{concat}(s_{t},a_{t},o_{t})) is implemented within the framework itself, enabling the training pipeline to directly observe and backpropagate through context transformation operations. This tight integration allows the framework to construct training sequences that faithfully reflect the CM-induced distribution, ensuring that the policy is optimized over the true inference-time state distribution. White-box integration is particularly effective for agents with well-defined CM strategies (e.g., sliding-window truncation, periodic summarization), where the framework can reconstruct exact training states.
items.zh: 白盒智能体将其上下文管理逻辑暴露给训练框架。状态转移 st+1 = f_CM(concat(st, at, ot)) 在框架内部实现，使训练流水线能够直接观察并通过上下文变换操作进行反向传播。这种紧密集成允许框架构建忠实反映CM诱导分布的训练序列，确保策略在真实的推理时状态分布上得到优化。白盒集成对于具有明确定义的CM策略（例如滑动窗口截断、周期性摘要）的智能体特别有效，此时框架可以重建精确的训练状态。

items.en: Black-Box Agents treat the agent as an opaque trajectory producer. Agents route completion requests to the RL service Gateway without exposing their internal context management, memory compression, or multi-agent coordination logic. The framework collects only the externally visible (st,at,ot)(s_{t},a_{t},o_{t}) tuples—where sts_{t} is the context as presented to the LLM at each completion request—and constructs training data from these observations. This non-intrusive paradigm supports arbitrary internal architectures, including deep thinking loops, aggressive context rewriting, and hierarchical multi-agent systems, delivering consistent improvements without requiring any agent-side modifications.
items.zh: 黑盒智能体将智能体视为不透明的轨迹生成器。智能体将补全请求路由到强化学习服务网关，而不暴露其内部上下文管理、记忆压缩或多智能体协调逻辑。框架仅收集外部可见的 (st, at, ot) 元组——其中 st 是每次补全请求时呈现给LLM的上下文——并根据这些观察构建训练数据。这种非侵入式范式支持任意内部架构，包括深度思考循环、激进的上下文重写和分层多智能体系统，无需任何智能体侧修改即可实现一致的改进。

items.en: The Gateway-based abstraction unifies both paradigms: white-box agents differ only in that their CM operations are registered with the framework for training-time reconstruction, while black-box agents rely solely on the observed request stream. This design has been validated across hundreds of distinct agent scaffolds and thousands of tool invocation formats.
items.zh: 基于网关的抽象统一了两种范式：白盒智能体的区别仅在于其CM操作已向框架注册以便训练时重建，而黑盒智能体则仅依赖观察到的请求流。该设计已在数百种不同的智能体脚手架和数千种工具调用格式上得到验证。

items.en: Agent rollout completion times exhibit extreme variance—from seconds for simple API calls to hours for complex reasoning chains—creating a fundamental tension between throughput and distributional consistency. Strict FIFO scheduling preserves the data distribution but suffers from straggler-induced head-of-line (HoL) blocking. Fully greedy scheduling (fetching whichever trajectory completes first) maximizes throughput but causes severe distribution shift: early training batches are dominated by short, easy tasks, while hard tasks cluster in later batches, leading to gradient oscillation and optimization instability.
items.zh: 智能体推出完成时间表现出极端方差——从几秒的简单API调用到几小时的复杂推理链——在吞吐量和分布一致性之间造成了根本性的张力。严格的FIFO调度保留了数据分布，但受到掉队者引起的队头阻塞的影响。完全贪婪调度（获取最先完成的轨迹）最大化吞吐量，但导致严重的分布偏移：早期训练批次被短、简单任务主导，而困难任务聚集在后期批次，导致梯度振荡和优化不稳定。

items.en: We propose Windowed FIFO (Figure 5), a hybrid scheduling strategy that interpolates between these extremes. Given a generation queue Q=[T0,T1,…,TN−1]Q=[T_{0},T_{1},\ldots,T_{N-1}] with current head index ii, the training scheduler may only fetch completed trajectories within a sliding window [Ti,Ti+W−1][T_{i},T_{i+W-1}], where WW is the window size (e.g., W=0.3​NW=0.3N). Within the window, the scheduler operates greedily—any completed trajectory may be fetched immediately, mitigating HoL blocking. Across window boundaries, strict ordering is enforced: trajectories beyond the window are blocked regardless of completion status, and the window advances only as head-of-window tasks are consumed.
items.zh: 我们提出窗口FIFO（图5），一种混合调度策略，在这两个极端之间插值。给定生成队列 Q = [T0, T1, ..., TN-1] 和当前头部索引 i，训练调度器只能获取滑动窗口 [Ti, Ti+W-1] 内完成的轨迹，其中 W 是窗口大小（例如 W=0.3N）。在窗口内，调度器贪婪操作——任何完成的轨迹都可以立即获取，缓解队头阻塞。跨窗口边界，强制执行严格顺序：窗口外的轨迹无论完成状态如何都被阻塞，窗口仅当窗口头部任务被消费时才前进。

items.en: This provides a tunable trade-off controlled by WW: smaller values approach strict FIFO (maximum distributional consistency), while larger values approach greedy scheduling (maximum throughput). In practice, W=0.3​NW=0.3N maintains near-FIFO distributional properties while substantially reducing cluster idle time.
items.zh: 这提供了由 W 控制的可调权衡：较小的值接近严格FIFO（最大分布一致性），而较大的值接近贪婪调度（最大吞吐量）。在实践中，W=0.3N 在保持接近FIFO的分布特性的同时，显著减少了集群空闲时间。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Windowed FIFO scheduling. The training scheduler only fetches completed trajectories within a sliding window of size WW over the generation queue: within the window, completion order is free (mitigating head-of-line blocking); across window boundaries, strict FIFO is enforced (preserving distributional consistency).
items.capZh: 图5：窗口FIFO调度。训练调度器仅获取生成队列上大小为 W 的滑动窗口内完成的轨迹：在窗口内，完成顺序自由（缓解队头阻塞）；跨窗口边界，强制执行严格FIFO（保持分布一致性）。

items.en: In multi-turn agent trajectories, sequential message appending and context management operations produce extensive shared prefixes across training samples within the same rollout group. Traditional training treats each sample independently, redundantly recomputing common prefixes—a particularly severe source of waste in long-context agent scenarios.
items.zh: 在多轮智能体轨迹中，顺序消息追加和上下文管理操作在相同推出组内的训练样本之间产生大量共享前缀。传统训练独立处理每个样本，冗余重新计算公共前缀——这在长上下文智能体场景中是一个特别严重的浪费来源。

items.en: We propose prefix tree merging (Figure 6), which restructures training computation from linear sample processing to tree-structured computation. Multiple completions sharing a common prefix are merged into a single prefix tree: the shared prefix is computed exactly once in the forward pass, after which the computation branches into individual response segments. After the forward pass, the tree is deconstructed using stored metadata, and loss is computed independently per sample.
items.zh: 我们提出前缀树合并（图6），将训练计算从线性样本处理重构为树结构计算。共享公共前缀的多个补全被合并到单个前缀树中：共享前缀在前向传播中精确计算一次，之后计算分支到各个响应段。前向传播后，使用存储的元数据解构树，并独立计算每个样本的损失。

items.en: This restructuring is mathematically equivalent to independent-sample training—the causal attention computation over a shared prefix produces identical activations regardless of whether it is computed once or kk times—guaranteeing zero approximation error. In practice, prefix tree merging achieves up to 40×40\times training speedup with corresponding reductions in memory consumption, enabling longer sequences and larger batch sizes without any compromise in training fidelity.
items.zh: 这种重构在数学上等价于独立样本训练——共享前缀上的因果注意力计算无论计算一次还是 k 次都会产生相同的激活——保证零近似误差。在实践中，前缀树合并实现了高达40倍的训练加速，并相应减少了内存消耗，使得在不牺牲训练保真度的情况下能够处理更长的序列和更大的批次大小。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Prefix tree merging. Completions that share a common prefix within a training batch are merged into a tree; the shared prefix is computed exactly once in the forward pass and the computation branches into individual response segments. The tree is deconstructed before the loss is computed independently per sample, so the procedure is mathematically equivalent to independent-sample training while eliminating redundant prefix recomputation.
items.capZh: 图6：前缀树合并。训练批次中共享公共前缀的补全被合并到一棵树中；共享前缀在前向传播中精确计算一次，计算分支到各个响应段。在独立计算每个样本的损失之前解构树，因此该过程在数学上等价于独立样本训练，同时消除了冗余的前缀重新计算。

items.en: We employ three architectural optimizations to maximize generation throughput for agent RL rollouts.
items.zh: 我们采用三种架构优化来最大化智能体强化学习（RL）rollout的生成吞吐量。

items.en: MTP-based Speculative Decoding. Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) modules are continuously co-trained with the RL policy via top-KK KL divergence loss. This co-training ensures that draft acceptance rates remain high throughout the non-stationary RL optimization process, preventing the distribution shift that would otherwise degrade speculative decoding performance as the policy evolves.
items.zh: 基于MTP的推测解码。多词预测（MTP）模块通过top-KK KL散度损失与RL策略持续协同训练。这种协同训练确保在非平稳的RL优化过程中，草稿接受率保持较高水平，从而防止因策略演化而导致分布偏移，否则会降低推测解码的性能。

items.en: Heterogeneous Prefill-Decode Disaggregation. Prefill and decode operations are decoupled into independently scheduled instances, eliminating the mutual interference that arises from mixed scheduling in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures. Each phase adopts parallelism strategies optimized for its computational profile, simultaneously maximizing global throughput and minimizing tail latency.
items.zh: 异构预填充-解码分离。预填充和解码操作被解耦为独立调度的实例，消除了混合专家（MoE）架构中混合调度带来的相互干扰。每个阶段采用针对其计算特性优化的并行策略，同时最大化全局吞吐量并最小化尾部延迟。

items.en: Global L3 KV Cache Pool. A distributed, DFS-backed global KV cache maximizes prefix cache hit rates through group-level rollout scheduling. A cost-aware request router dynamically balances queuing delay against cache migration costs, maximizing cache locality without overloading individual instances and avoiding redundant prefilling across the multi-turn interactions characteristic of agent RL.
items.zh: 全局L3 KV缓存池。一个分布式的、基于DFS的全局KV缓存通过组级rollout调度最大化前缀缓存命中率。一个成本感知的请求路由器动态平衡排队延迟与缓存迁移成本，最大化缓存局部性而不使单个实例过载，并避免在智能体RL特有的多轮交互中进行冗余预填充。

items.en: LLM agents must orchestrate multi-step workflows that alternate between natural-language reasoning and external tool invocations such as code execution, web browsing, and API calls. A critical design question is how the model’s chain-of-thought (CoT) should interact with tool-use turns, and whether prior reasoning state should be preserved across interaction rounds. In MiniMax-M2, we adopt interleaved thinking as a first-class agent modeling principle: the model alternates between explicit deliberation and tool execution within a single trajectory, carrying the full reasoning state forward across turns.
items.zh: LLM智能体必须编排多步骤工作流，在自然语言推理与外部工具调用（如代码执行、网页浏览和API调用）之间交替。一个关键的设计问题是模型的思维链（CoT）应如何与工具使用轮次交互，以及先前的推理状态是否应在交互轮次之间保留。在MiniMax-M2中，我们将交错思考作为一等智能体建模原则：模型在单个轨迹中交替进行显式推理和工具执行，并将完整的推理状态向前传递到后续轮次。

items.en: Interleaved chain-of-thought. We define interleaved thinking as a generation protocol in which the model produces reasoning tokens rtr_{t} and action tokens ata_{t} in an alternating sequence:
items.zh: 交错思维链。我们将交错思考定义为一种生成协议，其中模型以交替序列生成推理词元r_{t}和动作词元a_{t}：

items.en: where oto_{t} denotes the observation (tool output) returned after executing action ata_{t}. Each reasoning segment rtr_{t} is conditioned on the full history (r1,a1,o1,…,rt−1,at−1,ot−1)(r_{1},a_{1},o_{1},\ldots,r_{t-1},a_{t-1},o_{t-1}), allowing the model to revise plans, update hypotheses, and incorporate new evidence before selecting the next action. This contrasts with two common alternatives: (1) front-loaded reasoning, where all reasoning tokens are produced before any actions, preventing adaptation to intermediate observations; and (2) stateless per-turn reasoning, where prior reasoning tokens r<tr_{<t} are stripped from context before generating rtr_{t}, preventing the model from building on earlier analysis.
items.zh: 其中o_{t}表示执行动作a_{t}后返回的观察结果（工具输出）。每个推理段r_{t}基于完整历史(r_{1},a_{1},o_{1},…,r_{t-1},a_{t-1},o_{t-1})，允许模型在选择下一个动作之前修订计划、更新假设并整合新证据。这与两种常见替代方案形成对比：（1）前置推理，即所有推理词元在动作之前生成，阻止了对中间观察的适应；（2）无状态逐轮推理，即生成r_{t}之前从上下文中移除先前的推理词元r_{<t}，阻止了模型基于早期分析进行构建。

items.en: Reasoning state persistence. The key architectural decision enabling interleaved thinking is that the complete model output from turn tt—including all thinking blocks—is appended to the message history and provided as context for turn t+1t+1. Let ℋt\mathcal{H}_{t} denote the conversation history at turn tt. Under reasoning state persistence:
items.zh: 推理状态持久化。实现交错思考的关键架构决策是，第t轮的完整模型输出（包括所有思考块）被附加到消息历史中，并作为第t+1轮的上下文。令ℋ_{t}表示第t轮的对话历史。在推理状态持久化下：

items.en: When reasoning state is dropped, history degrades to ℋt+1(drop)=ℋt⊕[assistant​(at)]⊕[tool​(ot)]\mathcal{H}_{t+1}^{\text{(drop)}}=\mathcal{H}_{t}\oplus[\mathrm{assistant}(a_{t})]\oplus[\mathrm{tool}(o_{t})], forcing the model to re-derive context, constraints, and partial conclusions at every turn, leading to cumulative state drift and degraded self-correction.
items.zh: 当推理状态被丢弃时，历史退化为ℋ_{t+1}^{(drop)}=ℋ_{t}⊕[assistant(a_{t})]⊕[tool(o_{t})]，迫使模型在每一轮重新推导上下文、约束和部分结论，导致累积状态漂移和自纠正能力下降。

items.en: The Plan-Act-Reflect loop. Interleaved thinking operationalizes a structured cognitive loop at each turn tt: (1) Plan—the model reviews accumulated state from prior reasoning and observations, then formulates or refines a strategy; (2) Act—the model selects and executes a tool call grounded in the plan; (3) Reflect—the model evaluates the observation against expectations, updates its world model, and determines whether to revise the plan or proceed. This loop enables self-correction through reflection on unexpected observations, sample efficiency by reusing hypotheses and intermediate conclusions rather than re-deriving them, and debuggability via the interpretable reasoning trace. Figure 7 illustrates this process.
items.zh: 计划-行动-反思循环。交错思考在每一轮t中实现了一个结构化的认知循环：（1）计划——模型回顾来自先前推理和观察的累积状态，然后制定或完善策略；（2）行动——模型选择并执行基于计划的工具调用；（3）反思——模型将观察结果与预期进行比较，更新其世界模型，并决定是修订计划还是继续。这个循环通过反思意外观察实现自纠正，通过重用假设和中间结论而非重新推导来提高样本效率，并通过可解释的推理轨迹实现可调试性。图7展示了这一过程。

items.capEn: Figure 7: The Plan-Act-Reflect loop of interleaved thinking in M2.
items.capZh: 图7：M2中交错思考的计划-行动-反思循环。

items.en: Effect of reasoning state persistence. We ablate reasoning state persistence by stripping thinking blocks from prior turns before each model invocation, yielding consistent gains across agentic benchmarks, with particularly large improvements on tasks requiring extended multi-step reasoning like deep search and software engineering, indicating that interleaved thinking is most impactful when tasks demand sustained planning and iterative refinement across many steps.
items.zh: 推理状态持久化的影响。我们通过剥离先前轮次的思考块来消融推理状态持久化，在智能体基准测试中取得了一致的增益，在需要扩展多步推理的任务（如深度搜索和软件工程）上改进尤为显著，这表明交错思考在需要跨多步持续规划和迭代优化的任务中影响最大。

items.en: We detail a shift in model training toward self-evolution. Rather than a sudden leap, this shift represents the culmination of the M2 series’ steadily growing agentic capabilities—progressing from routine debugging and reporting tasks into a fully integrated pipeline where M2.7 actively drives its own iterative development (Figure 8).
items.zh: 我们详细描述了模型训练向自我进化的转变。这一转变并非突然的飞跃，而是M2系列不断增长的智能体能力的 culmination——从常规的调试和报告任务发展到完全集成的流水线，其中M2.7主动驱动自身的迭代开发（图8）。

items.en: To operationalize this, we developed the Model Iteration System (Figure 8A), which operates on the principle that humans steer while models build. Researchers configure goals, guide the agent via chat, and review outputs to decide the next steps. The agent functions within an “Agent Harness”—a workspace generated entirely by an internal M2.7 model with zero human-written code. This harness equips the model with hierarchical skills for action chaining, persistent memory, safety guardrails, and evaluation infrastructure.
items.zh: 为了实现这一目标，我们开发了模型迭代系统（图8A），其运行原则是人类引导而模型构建。研究人员配置目标、通过聊天引导智能体，并审查输出以决定下一步。智能体在一个“智能体框架”内运行——该工作空间完全由内部M2.7模型生成，无需人工编写代码。该框架为模型配备了用于动作链、持久记忆、安全护栏和评估基础设施的分层技能。

items.en: In practice, our RL team uses this system through a dynamic, dual-loop workflow (Figure 8B). Following human-led experiment planning, M2.7 enters an autonomous execution phase to profile ongoing runs, read logs, and diagnose metric anomalies. By automatically debugging code and adjusting configurations, the model directly intervenes in its training loop, absorbing 30% to 50% of the daily iteration workload. Human review triggers major iteration decisions, while the agent can auto-continue bounded analysis between reviews.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们的RL团队通过动态的双循环工作流使用该系统（图8B）。在人类主导的实验规划之后，M2.7进入自主执行阶段，以分析正在运行的进程、读取日志并诊断指标异常。通过自动调试代码和调整配置，模型直接干预其训练循环，吸收了30%到50%的日常迭代工作量。人类审查触发主要的迭代决策，而智能体可以在审查之间自动继续有限的分析。

items.en: Ultimately, this system enables recursive scaffold upgrades. Tasked with optimizing an internal programming scaffold, M2.7 executed a fully autonomous 100-round iteration cycle: analyzing failures, modifying code, and evaluating changes. This exploration introduced mechanisms such as loop detection and discovered better parameter combinations, yielding a 30% performance gain on in-house evaluations and showing that the model can improve the infrastructure shaping its subsequent iterations.
items.zh: 最终，该系统实现了递归的框架升级。在优化内部编程框架的任务中，M2.7执行了完全自主的100轮迭代循环：分析失败、修改代码和评估更改。这种探索引入了循环检测等机制，并发现了更好的参数组合，在内部评估中实现了30%的性能提升，表明模型可以改进塑造其后续迭代的基础设施。

items.capEn: Figure 8: (A) The Model Iteration System used to drive M2.7’s autonomous execution. (B) The dual-loop workflow used by our RL team.
items.capZh: 图8：（A）用于驱动M2.7自主执行的模型迭代系统。（B）我们的RL团队使用的双循环工作流。

items.en: We evaluate MiniMax-M2.7 against the strongest publicly deployed closed-weight frontier reasoning models—Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6 [anthropic2025claude46], GPT 5.4 [openai2025gpt5], and Gemini 3.1 Pro [google2025gemini31]—across three capability areas that mirror the design priorities of the M2 series: agentic coding, agentic cowork (search, multi-tool agents, and workspace operation), and reasoning & knowledge. To make the within-series progression explicit, we additionally report scores for the previous public release, MiniMax-M2.5. Throughout, we deliberately favor benchmarks that exercise long-horizon, environment-grounded behavior over closed-form QA, since those are the regimes the M2 data pipelines and Forge RL system are explicitly built for.
items.zh: 我们将MiniMax-M2.7与最强的公开部署闭权重前沿推理模型——Claude Opus 4.6、Claude Sonnet 4.6 [anthropic2025claude46]、GPT 5.4 [openai2025gpt5]和Gemini 3.1 Pro [google2025gemini31]——在三个能力领域进行评估，这些领域反映了M2系列的设计优先级：智能体编码、智能体协作（搜索、多工具智能体和工作空间操作）以及推理与知识。为了明确系列内的进展，我们额外报告了先前公开发布的MiniMax-M2.5的分数。在整个过程中，我们有意偏向于那些需要长周期、环境接地行为的基准测试，而非封闭形式的问答，因为这些是M2数据流水线和Forge RL系统明确构建的领域。

items.en: Models and inference modes. Each closed-weight baseline is evaluated in its strongest reasoning configuration: Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Sonnet 4.6 with extended thinking, GPT 5.4 with high reasoning effort, and Gemini 3.1 Pro with high reasoning effort. M2.7 and M2.5 are evaluated with thinking enabled and the interleaved-thinking trajectory protocol described in §7.1. Unless otherwise noted, generation uses temperature 1.0 and top-p 0.95; on agentic benchmarks all models share the same scaffold and tool environment.
items.zh: 模型与推理模式。每个闭权重基线在其最强推理配置下进行评估：Claude Opus 4.6和Claude Sonnet 4.6使用扩展思考，GPT 5.4使用高推理努力，Gemini 3.1 Pro使用高推理努力。M2.7和M2.5在启用思考并使用第7.1节描述的交错思考轨迹协议下进行评估。除非另有说明，生成使用温度1.0和top-p 0.95；在智能体基准测试中，所有模型共享相同的框架和工具环境。

items.en: Benchmarks. We organize the reported benchmarks into five blocks:
items.zh: 基准测试。我们将报告的基准测试组织为五个模块：

items.en: Software engineering and coding agent. SWE-bench Pro [swebenchpro2025] for industry-grade repository repair; SWE-bench Multilingual [rashid2025swebenchmultilingual] for cross-language repository-level editing; Multi-SWE-bench [multiswebench2025] for multi-repo task transfer; NL2Repo, our internal natural-language-to-repository synthesis benchmark; Terminal-Bench 2.0 [merrill2026terminalbench] for terminal and system-operation tasks; and MLE Bench Lite [chan2025mlebench] for autonomous machine-learning engineering, which we revisit as a self-evolution case study in §8.3.
items.zh: 软件工程与编码智能体。SWE-bench Pro [swebenchpro2025] 用于工业级仓库修复；SWE-bench Multilingual [rashid2025swebenchmultilingual] 用于跨语言仓库级编辑；Multi-SWE-bench [multiswebench2025] 用于多仓库任务迁移；NL2Repo，我们内部的自然语言到仓库合成基准；Terminal-Bench 2.0 [merrill2026terminalbench] 用于终端和系统操作任务；以及 MLE Bench Lite [chan2025mlebench] 用于自主机器学习工程，我们在 §8.3 中将其作为自我进化案例研究重新审视。

items.en: Application development. VIBE-Pro, our internal end-to-end full-stack application development benchmark; and HyperTask, an internal long-horizon “vibe coding” suite of ∼\sim100 feature- or step-level requirements per task.
items.zh: 应用开发。VIBE-Pro，我们内部的端到端全栈应用开发基准；以及 HyperTask，一个内部的长周期“氛围编码”套件，每个任务包含约 100 个功能或步骤级需求。

items.en: Cowork — search and deep research. BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp], Wide Search [liu2025widesearch], and our internal RISE benchmark for multi-step browsing under realistic web complexity.
items.zh: 协作——搜索与深度研究。BrowseComp [wei2025browsecomp]、Wide Search [liu2025widesearch] 以及我们内部的 RISE 基准，用于在真实网络复杂度下进行多步浏览。

items.en: Cowork — agent, office, and workspace. GDPval-AA [patwardhan2025gdpvalevaluatingaimodel], the Artificial-Analysis-judged subset of OpenAI’s GDPval office-task suite; Toolathlon [huang2025toolathlon] for heterogeneous tool use; MM Claw, our internal multi-modal office-claw benchmark; MEWC v2, an internal hard-task subset of 100 problems drawn from the Microsoft Excel World Championship pool; and Finance Modeling Pro, an internal Excel-grounded financial-modeling suite scored by expert rubrics.
items.zh: 协作——智能体、办公与工作空间。GDPval-AA [patwardhan2025gdpvalevaluatingaimodel]，OpenAI 的 GDPval 办公任务套件中由人工分析评判的子集；Toolathlon [huang2025toolathlon] 用于异构工具使用；MM Claw，我们内部的多模态办公爪基准；MEWC v2，从微软 Excel 世界锦标赛题库中抽取的 100 个难题的内部子集；以及 Finance Modeling Pro，一个内部的基于 Excel 的财务建模套件，由专家评分标准评分。

items.en: Reasoning and knowledge. AIME 2026 [aime2026] for competition mathematics; GPQA-Diamond [rein2024gpqa] for graduate-level science; SciCode [tian2024scicode] for scientific code generation; IFBench [pyatkin2025ifbench] for instruction following; AA-LCR (Artificial Analysis Long-Context Reasoning) for retrieval-and-reasoning over long inputs; HLE [phan2025humanity] (Humanity’s Last Exam, no-tool subset) for frontier-difficulty open knowledge; and MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlu] for broad knowledge.
items.zh: 推理与知识。AIME 2026 [aime2026] 用于竞赛数学；GPQA-Diamond [rein2024gpqa] 用于研究生级科学；SciCode [tian2024scicode] 用于科学代码生成；IFBench [pyatkin2025ifbench] 用于指令遵循；AA-LCR（人工分析长上下文推理）用于长输入上的检索与推理；HLE [phan2025humanity]（人类最后考试，无工具子集）用于前沿难度开放知识；以及 MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmlu] 用于广泛知识。

items.en: Evaluation configurations. SWE-bench Pro, SWE-bench Multilingual, Multi-SWE-bench, and NL2Repo are run on internal infrastructure with Claude Code as the unified scaffold (default system prompt overridden) for all models except GPT 5.4, which uses its native CodeX scaffold; results are averaged over 4 trials. Terminal-Bench 2.0 uses an 8 vCPU / 16 GB sandbox with a 2 hour wall-clock timeout, the Terminus-2 XML scaffold, and the verified 2.0 dataset (HuggingFace zai-org/terminal-bench-2-verified); 4 trials per model, baseline scores cited from official reports where not re-evaluated. MLE Bench Lite runs each of the 22 competitions in a single-A30 sandbox for 24 hours under our internal self-evolution scaffold (Bash + WebSearch); per-task scoring takes the best validation checkpoint and reports test-set medal rate; the final number is the mean of 3 independent 24-hour trials. VIBE-Pro uses Claude Code as the verifier for both interaction logic and visual fidelity, end-to-end through a containerized deployment, 3 trials averaged. HyperTask, MM Claw, MEWC v2, and Finance Modeling Pro use expert-defined rubrics scored over 3 trials. BrowseComp, Wide Search, and RISE share the WebExplorer [liu2025webexplorer] agent framework, with light edits to the system prompt and tool descriptions; when token usage exceeds 30 % of the maximum context, all assistant replies and tool returns are dropped to keep the search alive. RISE additionally enables a Playwright-based browser tool. GDPval-AA is the Artificial Analysis re-evaluation on OpenAI’s open GDPval dataset. AIME 2026, GPQA-Diamond, SciCode, IFBench, AA-LCR, HLE, and MMLU-Pro are evaluated under the Artificial Analysis Index v4.0 protocol with no tools and a single sample (pass@1).
items.zh: 评估配置。SWE-bench Pro、SWE-bench Multilingual、Multi-SWE-bench 和 NL2Repo 在内部基础设施上运行，使用 Claude Code 作为统一脚手架（默认系统提示被覆盖），除 GPT 5.4 使用其原生 CodeX 脚手架外；结果取 4 次试验的平均值。Terminal-Bench 2.0 使用 8 vCPU / 16 GB 沙箱，2 小时挂钟超时，Terminus-2 XML 脚手架，以及经过验证的 2.0 数据集（HuggingFace zai-org/terminal-bench-2-verified）；每个模型 4 次试验，基线分数引用自官方报告（若未重新评估）。MLE Bench Lite 在单个 A30 沙箱中运行 22 个比赛，每个比赛 24 小时，使用我们内部的自我进化脚手架（Bash + WebSearch）；每个任务评分取最佳验证检查点并报告测试集奖牌率；最终数字是 3 次独立 24 小时试验的平均值。VIBE-Pro 使用 Claude Code 作为验证器，验证交互逻辑和视觉保真度，通过容器化部署端到端进行，取 3 次试验的平均值。HyperTask、MM Claw、MEWC v2 和 Finance Modeling Pro 使用专家定义的评分标准，取 3 次试验的分数。BrowseComp、Wide Search 和 RISE 共享 WebExplorer [liu2025webexplorer] 智能体框架，对系统提示和工具描述进行了轻微修改；当 token 使用量超过最大上下文的 30% 时，所有助手回复和工具返回将被丢弃以保持搜索存活。RISE 额外启用了基于 Playwright 的浏览器工具。GDPval-AA 是在 OpenAI 的开放 GDPval 数据集上的人工分析重新评估。AIME 2026、GPQA-Diamond、SciCode、IFBench、AA-LCR、HLE 和 MMLU-Pro 在人工分析指数 v4.0 协议下评估，无工具且单样本（pass@1）。

items.en: Software engineering and coding agent. M2.7 is broadly competitive across the agentic-coding suite. It scores 56.2 on SWE-bench Pro, 76.5 on SWE-bench Multilingual, takes the top score among compared models on Multi-SWE-bench at 52.7, and reaches 57.0 on Terminal-Bench 2.0. On NL2Repo M2.7 reaches 39.8, a 13-point jump from M2.5 (26.6) that reflects the new full-stack repository data introduced in §4.1. On MLE Bench Lite M2.7 reaches a 66.6 % medal rate, a 15-point absolute jump over M2.5; we discuss this case in detail in §8.3.
items.zh: 软件工程与编码智能体。M2.7 在智能体编码套件中具有广泛竞争力。它在 SWE-bench Pro 上得分为 56.2，在 SWE-bench Multilingual 上为 76.5，在 Multi-SWE-bench 上以 52.7 的分数在比较模型中取得最高分，并在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上达到 57.0。在 NL2Repo 上，M2.7 达到 39.8，比 M2.5（26.6）提高了 13 分，这反映了 §4.1 中引入的新全栈仓库数据。在 MLE Bench Lite 上，M2.7 达到 66.6% 的奖牌率，比 M2.5 绝对提高了 15 分；我们在 §8.3 中详细讨论了这个案例。

items.en: Application development. On VIBE-Pro M2.7 reaches 55.6, on par with the leading closed-weight baselines. On the harder long-horizon HyperTask suite, M2.7 reaches 67.6, an 8-point improvement over M2.5. Application development is one of the cleanest domains for the M2 design thesis: with ∼\sim10 B activated parameters, the AppDev-targeted training data and Agent-as-a-Verifier reward (§4.1) close most of the gap to frontier models that activate an order of magnitude more parameters per token.
items.zh: 应用开发。在 VIBE-Pro 上，M2.7 达到 55.6，与领先的闭权重基线持平。在更困难的长周期 HyperTask 套件上，M2.7 达到 67.6，比 M2.5 提高了 8 分。应用开发是 M2 设计论点最清晰的领域之一：在约 100 亿激活参数下，针对应用开发的训练数据和智能体即验证器奖励（§4.1）缩小了与每个 token 激活参数多一个数量级的前沿模型之间的大部分差距。

items.en: Cowork — search and deep research. On the open-web search-and-synthesize triad, M2.7 reaches 77.8 on BrowseComp, 75.2 on Wide Search, and 64.3 on our internal RISE benchmark (designed to require non-trivial multi-step browsing and cross-source corroboration with a Playwright browser tool). RISE also marks the largest within-series gain in this block, climbing 14 points from M2.5 (50.2). M2.7 is most competitive on tasks demanding longer planning horizons and richer web interaction, consistent with the verifier-grounded data pipeline used to construct our deep-search training corpus (§4.2) and the persistent reasoning state of interleaved thinking across many turns (§7.1).
items.zh: 协作——搜索与深度研究。在开放网络搜索与综合三元组上，M2.7 在 BrowseComp 上达到 77.8，在 Wide Search 上达到 75.2，在我们内部的 RISE 基准上达到 64.3（该基准设计需要非平凡的多步浏览和跨来源验证，使用 Playwright 浏览器工具）。RISE 也标志着该模块中系列内最大的增益，从 M2.5（50.2）上升了 14 分。M2.7 在需要更长规划视野和更丰富网络交互的任务上最具竞争力，这与用于构建我们深度搜索训练语料库的验证器接地数据管道（§4.2）以及跨多轮的交错思考的持久推理状态（§7.1）一致。

items.en: Cowork — agent, office, and workspace. On heterogeneous tool-use benchmarks, M2.7 reaches 50.0 on GDPval-AA and 46.3 on Toolathlon. On Excel-grounded operation, M2.7 reaches 63.3 on MEWC v2 and 57.0 on Finance Modeling Pro; on MM Claw M2.7 reaches 62.7. This block shows the largest within-series headroom of any capability area in the M2 series, with substantial M2.5 →\to M2.7 gains on Excel-grounded benchmarks (MEWC v2 +13.5+13.5, Finance Modeling Pro +23.2+23.2) and on GDPval-AA (+15.0+15.0).
items.zh: 协作——智能体、办公与工作空间。在异构工具使用基准上，M2.7 在 GDPval-AA 上达到 50.0，在 Toolathlon 上达到 46.3。在基于 Excel 的操作上，M2.7 在 MEWC v2 上达到 63.3，在 Finance Modeling Pro 上达到 57.0；在 MM Claw 上，M2.7 达到 62.7。该模块显示了 M2 系列中任何能力领域最大的系列内提升空间，在基于 Excel 的基准（MEWC v2 +13.5，Finance Modeling Pro +23.2）和 GDPval-AA（+15.0）上，M2.5 到 M2.7 有显著提升。

items.en: Reasoning and knowledge. M2.7 is competitive on the reasoning-heavy benchmarks where evaluation reduces to a single sample without tools. M2.7 scores 94.2 on AIME 2026, 89.8 on GPQA-Diamond, 76.0 on IFBench, and 72.0 on AA-LCR, placing it in the frontier band on each. The IFBench result in particular reflects the multi-domain RL strategy and rubric-based response filtering described in §4.3 and §6. On the broader knowledge benchmarks, M2.7 reaches 81.8 on MMLU-Pro, 47.0 on SciCode, and 28.0 on HLE.
items.zh: 推理与知识。M2.7 在推理密集型基准上具有竞争力，这些基准的评估简化为单样本且无工具。M2.7 在 AIME 2026 上得分为 94.2，在 GPQA-Diamond 上为 89.8，在 IFBench 上为 76.0，在 AA-LCR 上为 72.0，在每个基准上都处于前沿区间。IFBench 的结果特别反映了 §4.3 和 §6 中描述的多领域强化学习策略和基于评分标准的响应过滤。在更广泛的知识基准上，M2.7 在 MMLU-Pro 上达到 81.8，在 SciCode 上达到 47.0，在 HLE 上达到 28.0。

items.en: Within-series progression. To complement the cross-model snapshot of Table 4, Figure 9 traces the trajectory of the M2 series itself from the original M2 release through M2.5 to the current M2.7, restricted to the eleven benchmarks for which all three checkpoints have been evaluated under our scaffold. Two patterns stand out. First, every benchmark in this set improves across the three checkpoints, with absolute gains ranging from +11+11 points (AA-LCR, GPQA-Diamond) to +33.8+33.8 points (BrowseComp). Second, the size of the gain tracks the data-pipeline investments described in §4: the benchmarks where the M2.5 / M2.7 corpora introduced new task families—deep search (BrowseComp +33.8+33.8, Wide Search +12.9+12.9), tool use (Toolathlon +27.5+27.5, GDPval-AA +16.0+16.0), and autonomous ML engineering (MLE Bench Lite +26.6+26.6)—show the steepest jumps, while benchmarks the original M2 was already strong on (SWE-bench Multilingual, Multi-SWE-bench) progress more incrementally. Reasoning benchmarks (AIME 2025 +16.0+16.0, GPQA-Diamond +11.8+11.8, AA-LCR +11.0+11.0) follow a steadier curve consistent with the multi-axis scaling of the reasoning data pipeline. Taken together, the figure indicates that each of the three contribution axes of the M2 series—agentic data, the Forge RL system (§6), and self-evolution (§7.2)—translates into a stable improvement trajectory at every release rather than concentrating in any single checkpoint.
items.zh: 系列内进展。为了补充表 4 的跨模型快照，图 9 追踪了 M2 系列本身从原始 M2 发布到 M2.5 再到当前 M2.7 的轨迹，仅限于所有三个检查点都在我们的脚手架下评估的 11 个基准。两个模式突出。首先，该集合中的每个基准在三个检查点中都有改进，绝对增益从 +11 分（AA-LCR、GPQA-Diamond）到 +33.8 分（BrowseComp）不等。其次，增益的大小与 §4 中描述的数据管道投资相关：M2.5 / M2.7 语料库引入新任务族的基准——深度搜索（BrowseComp +33.8，Wide Search +12.9）、工具使用（Toolathlon +27.5，GDPval-AA +16.0）和自主机器学习工程（MLE Bench Lite +26.6）——显示出最陡峭的跳跃，而原始 M2 已经很强的基准（SWE-bench Multilingual、Multi-SWE-bench）进展更为渐进。推理基准（AIME 2025 +16.0，GPQA-Diamond +11.8，AA-LCR +11.0）遵循更稳定的曲线，与推理数据管道的多轴缩放一致。综合来看，该图表明 M2 系列的三个贡献轴——智能体数据、Forge 强化学习系统（§6）和自我进化（§7.2）——在每次发布时都转化为稳定的改进轨迹，而不是集中在任何一个检查点。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Capability progression of the MiniMax-M2 series across eleven benchmarks. Each panel groups benchmarks by capability area, and within each benchmark the three bars correspond to the original M2 release, M2.5, and the current M2.7. AIME numbers in this figure refer to AIME 2025, the only AIME edition reported for all three checkpoints; the BrowseComp number for M2 is the Hugging Face official score. All eleven benchmarks improve across the three checkpoints, with the largest gains concentrated in the agentic deep-search, tool-use, and autonomous ML-engineering domains where the M2.5 / M2.7 data pipelines added new task families.
items.capZh: 图 9：MiniMax-M2 系列在 11 个基准上的能力进展。每个面板按能力领域分组基准，在每个基准内，三个条形对应原始 M2 发布、M2.5 和当前 M2.7。此图中的 AIME 数字指 AIME 2025，这是所有三个检查点都报告的唯一年份；M2 的 BrowseComp 数字是 Hugging Face 官方分数。所有 11 个基准在三个检查点中都有改进，最大增益集中在智能体深度搜索、工具使用和自主机器学习工程领域，其中 M2.5 / M2.7 数据管道添加了新的任务族。

full.sec: 8.3 Case Study: Self-Evolution on MLE Bench Lite
full.secZh: 8.3 案例研究：MLE Bench Lite上的自我进化

items.en: The MLE Bench Lite result in Table 4 is the most direct evidence for the self-evolution capability whose system design is described in Section˜7.2. The underlying driver is M2.7’s strength in Machine Learning Engineering (MLE): on OpenAI’s MLE Bench Lite [chan2025mlebench], M2.7 ties Gemini 3.1 Pro, demonstrating the frontier-level ability required to independently orchestrate ML pipelines and modify its own training scaffolds.
items.zh: 表 4 中的 MLE Bench Lite 结果是自我进化能力的最直接证据，其系统设计在 §7.2 中描述。根本驱动力是 M2.7 在机器学习工程（MLE）方面的实力：在 OpenAI 的 MLE Bench Lite [chan2025mlebench] 上，M2.7 与 Gemini 3.1 Pro 持平，展示了独立编排机器学习管道和修改自身训练脚手架所需的前沿级能力。

items.en: To test this capability under a controlled setting, we evaluated M2.7 as an independent ML engineer across 22 competitions from MLE Bench Lite. While computationally lightweight, these tasks cover all stages of a standard ML workflow.
items.zh: 为了在受控设置下测试这种能力，我们在 MLE Bench Lite 的 22 个比赛中评估了 M2.7 作为独立机器学习工程师。虽然计算量轻，但这些任务涵盖了标准机器学习工作流程的所有阶段。

items.en: To guide the model, we implemented a simple autonomous harness driven by short-term memory and self-feedback, with no human-written code in the harness itself. After completing an iteration, the agent documents a memory file and performs rigorous self-criticism. This self-reflective critique establishes explicit optimization directions for subsequent runs, allowing the model to build upon an accumulated feedback chain.
items.zh: 为了指导模型，我们实现了一个简单的自主框架，由短期记忆和自我反馈驱动，框架本身没有人类编写的代码。完成一次迭代后，智能体记录一个记忆文件并进行严格的自我批评。这种自我反思的批评为后续运行建立了明确的优化方向，使模型能够建立在累积的反馈链上。

items.en: We executed three independent trials, allowing 24 hours of iterative evolution per run. As illustrated in Figure 10, M2.7 demonstrated clear cumulative improvement, steadily increasing its medal rate over time. The best run yielded 9 gold medals, 5 silver medals, and 1 bronze medal. Averaging a 66.6% medal rate across trials, M2.7 ties Gemini 3.1 Pro, demonstrating its capacity to autonomously navigate and optimize complex, end-to-end ML pipelines.
items.zh: 我们执行了三次独立试验，每次运行允许 24 小时的迭代进化。如图 10 所示，M2.7 展示了清晰的累积改进，其奖牌率随时间稳步增加。最佳运行获得了 9 枚金牌、5 枚银牌和 1 枚铜牌。在三次试验中平均奖牌率为 66.6%，M2.7 与 Gemini 3.1 Pro 持平，展示了其自主导航和优化复杂端到端机器学习管道的能力。

items.en: We highlight this case not just for the numerical outcome but for the qualitative observation that M2.7 willingly debugs its own training scaffold, modifies configuration files, and iterates over hundreds of rounds—behaviors that close the mini-activations →\to max real-world intelligence loop the M2 series is designed around.
items.zh: 我们强调这个案例不仅因为数值结果，还因为定性观察：M2.7 愿意调试自己的训练脚手架、修改配置文件并迭代数百轮——这些行为闭合了 M2 系列设计的“小激活 → 最大真实世界智能”循环。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Medal rate of M2.7 on MLE Bench Lite across iterative trials.
items.capZh: 图 10：M2.7 在 MLE Bench Lite 上跨迭代试验的奖牌率。

items.en: We presented the MiniMax-M2 series, a family of Mixture-of-Experts language models built around the thesis that mini activations can unleash maximum real-world intelligence. The flagship M2 pairs a 9.8B-activated / 229.9B-total backbone with three components that co-evolve from M2 through M2.5 to the current M2.7 checkpoint: agent-driven data pipelines that ground every training trajectory in an executable workspace and an artifact-aligned reward; Forge, an agent-native RL system that scales long-horizon training across both white-box and black-box agent loops; and an early operational form of self-evolution, in which M2.7 autonomously debugs its own training runs and modifies its agent scaffold. Together, these components translate a ∼\sim10 B activated-parameter footprint into parity with frontier systems an order of magnitude larger in per-step compute on agentic coding, agentic cowork, and reasoning & knowledge benchmarks. We view these results as one step along a longer trajectory: each axis—data, RL system, and self-evolution—remains far from saturation, and subsequent M2.x checkpoints will continue scaling all three in concert.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 MiniMax-M2 系列，这是一个基于混合专家模型的语言模型家族，围绕“小激活可以释放最大真实世界智能”这一论点构建。旗舰 M2 将 98 亿激活 / 2299 亿总参数的骨干与三个组件配对，这些组件从 M2 到 M2.5 再到当前 M2.7 检查点共同进化：智能体驱动的数据管道，将每个训练轨迹锚定在可执行工作空间和与工件对齐的奖励中；Forge，一个智能体原生强化学习系统，将长周期训练扩展到白盒和黑盒智能体循环；以及自我进化的早期操作形式，其中 M2.7 自主调试自己的训练运行并修改其智能体脚手架。这些组件共同将约 100 亿激活参数的足迹转化为在智能体编码、智能体协作以及推理与知识基准上与每步算力大一个数量级的前沿系统持平。我们将这些结果视为更长远轨迹上的一步：每个轴——数据、强化学习系统和自我进化——都远未饱和，后续的 M2.x 检查点将继续协同扩展所有三者。
